scripts.dev:marketplace: cmd /c "set LOCAL_FRONTEND_ROLE=marketplace&& set NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev-marketplace-3000&& npm --prefix frontend/frontend run dev -- --port 3000"
scripts.dev:admin: cmd /c "set LOCAL_FRONTEND_ROLE=admin&& set NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev-admin-3005&& npm --prefix frontend/frontend run dev -- --port 3005"
scripts.build:mobile:android:preview: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform android --profile preview"
scripts.build:mobile:android:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure ; cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform android --profile staging"
scripts.build:mobile:android:production: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform android --profile production"
scripts.build:mobile:ios:preview: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform ios --profile preview"
scripts.build:mobile:ios:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure ; cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform ios --profile staging"
scripts.build:mobile:ios:production: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform ios --profile production"
scripts.build:nadotongryoksa:android:preview: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-nadotongryoksa && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform android --profile preview"
scripts.build:nadotongryoksa:android:apk: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-nadotongryoksa && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform android --profile production-apk"
scripts.build:nadotongryoksa:android:production: cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-nadotongryoksa && npx eas-cli build --non-interactive --platform android --profile production"
scripts.submit:mobile:android:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure ; cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli submit --non-interactive --platform android --profile staging"
scripts.submit:mobile:ios:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure ; cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli submit --non-interactive --platform ios --profile staging"
scripts.submit:mobile:android:production: npm run eas:project:ensure ; npm run release:gate:mobile:production ; cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli submit --non-interactive --platform android --profile production"
scripts.submit:mobile:ios:production: npm run eas:project:ensure ; npm run release:gate:mobile:production ; cmd /c "cd /d apps\mobile-stock-ai && npx eas-cli submit --non-interactive --platform ios --profile production"
scripts.build:admin: cmd /c "set NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build&& npm --prefix frontend/frontend run build"
scripts.e2e:marketplace-liveview: cmd /c "cd /d frontend\frontend && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011&& npm run e2e:marketplace-liveview"
scripts.e2e:marketplace-liveview:sheet: cmd /c "cd /d frontend\frontend && set PLAYWRIGHT_MARKETPLACE_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000&& npm run e2e:marketplace-liveview:sheet"
scripts.e2e:marketplace-liveview:launcher: cmd /c "cd /d frontend\frontend && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011&& npm run e2e:marketplace-liveview:launcher"
scripts.e2e:marketplace-liveview:all: cmd /c "cd /d frontend\frontend && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011&& npm run e2e:marketplace-liveview:all"
